creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
This PR supersedes ports/16467, which at this
time has already been closed by billf.

I have tested this to make sure that it works,
and with _NO_ kde or Qt (1.x) libraries installed.

Also, at the request of rwatson, I checked to
make sure the CLIENTINFO reply doesn't contain the
word "Linux" in it like it did in v0.9.0. :-)

Also, Jim Mock (jim@FreeBSD.org) noted that on his
machine, which did not have Qt installed, it failed
unless there was --with-qt-[include,library]-dir for
the configure args. Thanks!

How-To-Repeat: 
Apply the patch against the current port.
